AMENDED DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY CROSS DEFENDANT CHINESE NEWCOMERS SERVICE CENTER HEARING SET FOR NOV-16-2011 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, CROSS-DEFENDANT CHINESE NEWCOMERS SERVICE CENTER'S MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS-COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 16, 2011 PER AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077

LAW AND MOTION 302, CROSS-DEFENDANT CHINESE NEWCOMERS SERVICE CENTER'S AMENDED MOTION TO STRIKE ACADEMIE DE CUISINE LLC'S CROSS COMPLAINT IS DENIED. IN RULING ON THE MOTION, THE COURT MUST ASSUME THAT THE FACTUAL ALLEGATIONS OF THE CROSS-COMPLAINT ARE TRUE. THE CROSS-COMPLAINT ARISES OUT OF THE SAME TRANSACTION, OCCURRENCE, OR SERIES OF TRANSACTIONS OR OCCURRENCES AS THE CLAIMS ALLEGED IN THE COMPLAINT AND THUS IS PERMISSIBLE UNDER CCP 428.10(B). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077
LAW AND MOTION 302, CROSS DEFENDANT CHINESE NEWCOMERS SERVICE CENTER MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT IS A DUPLICATE ENTRY.

Off Calendar Nov-16-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOHN HOUSTON SCOTT OF THE SCOTT LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 561-9600 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. CATHERINE A. SALAH OF GORDON & REES LLP, TEL. NO. 986-5900 APPEARING FOR THE CROSS-DFENDANT CHINESE NEWCOMERS SERVICE CENTER.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: CROSS-DEFENDANT CHINESE NEWCOMERS SERVICE CENTER'S AMENDED MOTION TO STRIKE ACADEMIE DE CUISINE LLC'S CROSS COMPLAINT IS Denied. In ruling on the motion, the court must assume that the factual allegations of the cross-complaint are true. The cross-complaint arises out of the same transaction, occurrence, or series of transactions or occurrences as the claims alleged in the complaint and thus is permissible under CCP 428.10(b).
